message:
✨ Add beforeCards prop and migrate GitOps dashboard to DashboardPage (#476)

* ✨ Add beforeCards prop to DashboardPage and create AIML/CICD dashboards

- Add beforeCards prop to DashboardPage for content between stats and cards (tabs, filters)
- Create AIML dashboard using DashboardPage pattern for AI/ML workload monitoring
- Create CICD dashboard using DashboardPage pattern for pipeline monitoring
- Both new dashboards use isDemoData flag to indicate placeholder data

This enhancement enables migration of tab-based dashboards (Events, Security, GitOps)
that have content rendered between the stats overview and cards section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Migrate GitOps dashboard to DashboardPage (45% reduction)

- Migrate GitOps.tsx from 805 to 439 lines using DashboardPage wrapper
- Use new beforeCards prop for filters and apps list content
- Remove SortableCard, DragPreviewCard, and manual DnD boilerplate
- Remove manual modal management (AddCardModal, TemplatesModal, ConfigureCardModal)
- Remove FloatingDashboardActions manual rendering
- Preserve all business logic for drift detection and sync functionality
- SyncDialog remains as custom modal outside DashboardPage

Bundle size: GitOps.js reduced from 24.74 kB to 21.46 kB

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
